title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Zara India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Zara India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Zara India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zara India Digital Technologies:
Zara India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zara India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
